tasks.title: Set up a reproducible LFCS practice environment
tasks.achievementCriteria: Can boot into a Linux VM, create a non-root user, and configure sudo safely.
tasks.endTask: Provision one VM and document base setup commands used.
tasks.requiredEvidence: Terminal transcript showing user creation, sudo verification, and hostname check.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Evaluate whether the learner successfully created and validated a non-root administrative environment for LFCS practice.

tasks.title: Master file navigation and inspection
tasks.achievementCriteria: Confidently uses pwd, ls variants, cd, file, stat, and tree alternatives.
tasks.endTask: Inspect a mixed directory and identify file types and metadata.
tasks.requiredEvidence: Command output demonstrating at least 8 inspection commands on different targets.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Assess command fluency and accuracy of filesystem inspection outputs.

tasks.title: Filter and transform text streams
tasks.achievementCriteria: Uses grep, cut, sort, uniq, wc, sed, and awk to answer practical questions.
tasks.endTask: Extract failed SSH attempts from logs and summarize counts per IP.
tasks.requiredEvidence: One-liner pipeline plus sample output and explanation.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Verify that the pipeline logic is correct, efficient, and produces accurate summaries.

tasks.title: Use shell redirection and scripting basics
tasks.achievementCriteria: Can redirect stdout/stderr, append safely, and automate repetitive tasks with bash scripts.
tasks.endTask: Write a script that audits disk usage and logs alerts for large directories.
tasks.requiredEvidence: Script file plus execution output for a sample run.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Judge script clarity, redirection correctness, and reliability of produced output.

tasks.title: Administer users and groups
tasks.achievementCriteria: Creates, modifies, and locks user accounts and groups with correct defaults.
tasks.endTask: Create role-based accounts for ops, dev, and audit teams.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Determine if user/group administration meets policy and least-privilege expectations.

tasks.title: Apply Linux permissions and ACLs
tasks.achievementCriteria: Correctly sets ownership, mode bits, special permissions, and ACL entries.
tasks.endTask: Implement collaborative directory permissions for a project team.
tasks.requiredEvidence: before/after ls -l and getfacl output with rationale.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Evaluate permission model correctness and whether access goals are met without overexposure.

tasks.title: Control processes and jobs
tasks.achievementCriteria: Tracks, prioritizes, and terminates processes safely using ps, top, kill, nice, and renice.
tasks.endTask: Diagnose and remediate one high-CPU process scenario.
tasks.requiredEvidence: Process snapshots and commands executed with outcome notes.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Check whether process diagnosis and remediation actions are technically sound.

tasks.title: Manage systemd services and logs
tasks.achievementCriteria: Starts, enables, troubleshoots, and validates services using systemctl and journalctl.
tasks.endTask: Deploy a sample service unit and verify startup behavior.
tasks.requiredEvidence: Unit file, systemctl status output, and journal excerpts.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Assess service unit validity, startup behavior, and troubleshooting quality.

tasks.title: Configure interfaces and hostname resolution
tasks.achievementCriteria: Can configure static or DHCP interfaces and verify DNS resolution.
tasks.endTask: Configure one static interface and validate connectivity and name lookup.
tasks.requiredEvidence: ip addr/ip route output, resolver config, and ping/dig results.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Evaluate network configuration correctness and validation evidence completeness.

tasks.title: Harden access with SSH settings and firewall basics
tasks.achievementCriteria: Adjusts sshd_config and permits only required ports/services through firewall tools.
tasks.endTask: Restrict SSH auth method and enforce a minimal ingress rule set.
tasks.requiredEvidence: Configuration diff plus firewall rule listing and connection test results.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Check security posture improvements and verify that required access remains functional.

tasks.title: Partition disks and manage filesystems
tasks.achievementCriteria: Creates partitions, formats filesystems, and mounts persistently with /etc/fstab.
tasks.endTask: Add a new data volume mounted at boot.
tasks.requiredEvidence: fdisk/lsblk output, mkfs command, fstab entry, and mount verification.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Judge whether storage changes are safe, persistent, and correctly validated.

tasks.title: Set up LVM and swap
tasks.achievementCriteria: Creates PV/VG/LV, extends logical volumes, and configures swap space.
tasks.endTask: Create an LVM-backed mount and expand it without downtime.
tasks.requiredEvidence: pvs/vgs/lvs snapshots before and after expansion, plus swapon output.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Assess correctness of LVM lifecycle actions and operational safety during expansion.

tasks.title: Schedule maintenance and verification jobs
tasks.achievementCriteria: Creates reliable cron/systemd timer jobs and validates execution.
tasks.endTask: Schedule nightly backup verification and capture execution logs.
tasks.requiredEvidence: crontab or timer unit plus log evidence from at least one run.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Evaluate scheduling correctness, observability, and practical reliability.

tasks.title: Apply baseline hardening practices
tasks.achievementCriteria: Implements updates, auditing basics, and least-privilege checks.
tasks.endTask: Run a baseline hardening checklist on the practice VM.
tasks.requiredEvidence: Checklist results with command output for each completed control.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Determine whether hardening actions are meaningful, complete, and verifiable.

tasks.title: Run an LFCS-style timed lab
tasks.achievementCriteria: Completes representative objectives under time pressure with minimal reference checks.
tasks.endTask: Perform a 2-hour mock exam covering commands, services, networking, and storage.
tasks.requiredEvidence: Task checklist with timestamps and final system validation outputs.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Assess readiness based on completion rate, correctness, and troubleshooting approach under constraints.

tasks.title: Perform gap analysis and remediation plan
tasks.achievementCriteria: Identifies weak domains and assigns concrete remediation tasks for next cycle.
tasks.endTask: Produce a one-week remediation plan prioritized by impact.
tasks.requiredEvidence: Summary report with weak areas, root causes, and targeted follow-up actions.
tasks.gradingPrompt: Evaluate whether the remediation plan is specific, prioritized, and realistically actionable.
